allow: PowerShell(Set-Location c:\\projects\\markus-aurelius-web; npm run preview -- --port 4322 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 5)

PowerShell(Set-Location c:\\projects\\markus-aurelius-web; $out = npm run build 2>&1; $errors = $out | Where-Object { $_ -match "error|Error|ERROR|Caught" }; if \($errors\) { Write-Host "ERRORS:"; $errors | Select-Object -First 30 } else { $out | Select-Object -Last 5 })
PowerShell(Set-Location c:\\projects\\markus-aurelius-web; $out = npm run build 2>&1 | Out-String; $out -split "`n" | Where-Object { $_ -match "error|Error|ERROR" } | Select-Object -First 30)

PowerShell(Set-Location c:\\projects\\markus-aurelius-web; npm run build 2>&1 | Out-File "c:\\projects\\markus-aurelius-web\\build.log" -Encoding utf8; \(Get-Content "c:\\projects\\markus-aurelius-web\\build.log"\) | Select-String -Pattern "error|expected|invalid" -CaseSensitive:$false -Context 2 | Select-Object -First 30)
